name: perform-autofit-viewport
note: Sizing model v3 AUTO-FIT-THEN-WRAP (operator-refined 2026-07-24), rule 1+2: the default font AUTO-FITS the viewport width - EXPANDS to fill a wide viewport (up to the 2.2 cap), SHRINKS on a narrow one (down to the 0.8 floor), and while the fitted size is ABOVE the floor nothing wraps (fit-by-font first; wrap only at the floor). A viewport WIDTH resize (not just rotation) re-fits via the debounced resize listener. The seeded song's widest row is ~31 chars, chosen so 412px fits ABOVE the floor (no wrap), a desktop width clamps at the 2.2 cap, and a narrow phone still fits above the floor - each viewport proves a different leg of the fit curve. Red-first vs the v2 wrap-first branch: the size was a fixed user scale (1.0 default) at EVERY viewport, so the wide-viewport EXPAND assertions below fail there.

seed.roadcase-ukulele-gcea.custom.v1: [{"id":"autofit1","t":"Autofit Song","a":"Me","y":2026,"d":"Mine","custom":true,"forkOf":"k1","seq":["C","G"],"sheet":[["Verse","[C]hello wide world [G]sing it loud"],["Verse","[C]a second line to [G]hold the tune"]]}]

steps.label: 412px portrait: auto-fit EXPANDED past the neutral 1.0 to fill the width (strictly between floor and cap), NO wrap above the floor (2 seeded lines = 2 rows), no row overflows
steps.js: (function(){var p=document.querySelector('.perform');if(!p||!p.classList.contains('on'))return false;var pSheet=document.getElementById('pSheet');var sc=parseFloat(getComputedStyle(pSheet).getPropertyValue('--pscale'));if(!(sc>1.05&&sc<2.19))return false;var rows=pSheet.querySelectorAll('.lyrLine');if(rows.length!==2)return false;var cs=getComputedStyle(pSheet);var avail=pSheet.clientWidth-(parseFloat(cs.paddingLeft)||0)-(parseFloat(cs.paddingRight)||0);for(var i=0;i<rows.length;i++){if(rows[i].scrollWidth>avail+1)return false;}window.__portrait=sc;return true;})()

steps.label: 1024px desktop: the resize listener RE-FIT - the scale GREW past the portrait value toward/at the 2.2 cap, still no wrap, still no overflow
steps.js: (function(){var pSheet=document.getElementById('pSheet');var sc=parseFloat(getComputedStyle(pSheet).getPropertyValue('--pscale'));if(!(sc>window.__portrait+0.1))return false;if(!(sc<=2.201))return false;var rows=pSheet.querySelectorAll('.lyrLine');if(rows.length!==2)return false;var cs=getComputedStyle(pSheet);var avail=pSheet.clientWidth-(parseFloat(cs.paddingLeft)||0)-(parseFloat(cs.paddingRight)||0);for(var i=0;i<rows.length;i++){if(rows[i].scrollWidth>avail+1)return false;}window.__wide=sc;return true;})()

steps.label: 320px narrow: re-fit SHRANK below the 412px scale (still at or above the 0.8 floor), no overflow - and with the fit still above the floor, STILL no wrap (fit-by-font first)
back to 412px: the fit returns to the original portrait scale (deterministic re-fit, no drift), no overflow
